item.title: Agentic AI is scaling in manufacturing, but infrastructure gaps remain
item.description: Discussion on the commercial scaling of AI in manufacturing and the hardware/infrastructure investments needed to support automated inspection.

item.title: GigaVis Wins 7.2 Billion-Won Inspection Equipment Order From Chinese Substrate Maker
item.description: GigaVis secures a significant commercial order for inspection equipment, highlighting robust market demand in semiconductor manufacturing.

item.title: Visions Podcast: Embedded AI and Smart Cameras: The Next Decade of Machine Vision
item.description: An industry discussion on how embedded AI and smart camera hardware will drive machine vision commercial growth over the next decade.

item.title: From Camera to Insight: Platform Simplifies Industrial AI Inspection
item.description: A new platform launch designed to simplify the deployment of AI-based industrial vision inspection systems.

item.title: Automated Optical Inspection Market Size, Share, Growth, 2034 - Straits Research
item.description: A detailed report on the growing market size and share of commercial Automated Optical Inspection systems up to 2034.

item.title: Annual Industrial Robot Shipments ‘Will Reach More Than 760k Units in 2030’
item.description: Market trends predict massive commercial growth for industrial robot shipments driving automated quality inspection solutions by 2030.

item.title: Portable Optical Inspection System Built for High-Volume CNC Production
item.description: A new portable optical inspection system provides scalable solutions for high-volume CNC manufacturing environments.
